顯示卡+$300
INNO3D GEFORCE GTX1660 TWIN X2 6GB GDDR5 HK$1699.00

https://gpu.userbenchmark.com/Compare/Nvidia-GTX-1650-vs-Nvidia-GTX-1660/4039vs4038

1660 跑分快過1650 50%
如果你玩食雞，俾多少少揀1660啦
